mentions.note: Private company; $400M+ revenue, 10x YoY growth, will cross $1B in 2026; open-weight model approach breaking AI concentration; Cramer would buy on IPO but not yet public.
Private company; CEO Arthur Mensch discussed at GTC as canvas for AI applications; not yet public.
Big beneficiary of CPU-GPU pivot for AI agents; ties tighten with Nvidia as agentic computing requires more flexible processor architectures.
Losing a lot of money; no appetite for unprofitable stocks in tough market even with high-tech security niche at airports.
Competition significantly worse than expected; management unable to control pressures; formerly great performer now momentum broken, recommend avoiding.
Better alternative to Blue Owl in private equity/credit space; 5% yield; superior management.
7.4% yield not enough to attract buyers in stagflation scare; sector under pressure regardless of dividend appeal.
Key customer connector for enterprises adopting Nvidia accelerated computing; most undervalued stock in market; only if it retreats from current levels.
Good quarter with 6.5% yield unable to rally; stagflation fears too powerful to buck despite improving fundamentals.
Buy in large tranches at 500, 475, 450 — aging population and AI cost efficiency support case; can move quickly on weakness.
Psoriasis pill FDA approval significant but stock down despite good news; stagflation narrative overpowering positive catalysts; wait for better opportunity.
Too speculative; losing too much money; no more 'magical investing' in unprofitable growth stories in current tough market environment.
Market in 'giving up' moment on one of greatest drug companies in history; GLP-1 pill will be gigantic; buy this 'giving up' dislocation.
Down $10 on market selloff; fantastic quarter; buy weakness.
$2.8B Warner breakup fee, $20B content investment, ad revenue doubling plans support upside; leg into position slowly in weak market to avoid all-in at wrong time.
Chinese EV maker posted first profitable quarter with record deliveries; 14B market cap; analyst comparison to Chinese Tesla reasonable at current valuation.
At GTC conference saw remarkable ecosystem of companies building on Nvidia's AI platform; best-in-class growth rate with lowest valuation in market; own don't trade it.
Private company; Cramer noted ChatGPT and emergence of AI agents as huge opportunity driver for Nvidia infrastructure; not yet public.
Good but others are better; Nvidia offers superior risk/reward despite massive pullback from highs.
Prefer Blackstone in private credit space; BX has 5% yield and better management.

Up 50%+ from April lows; simplifying to pure-play utility with 7-9% EPS growth; Texas electricity demand growing 3x national average; LNG portfolio expanding with KKR partnership; compelling growth-and-income combination.

Down 25% from September highs; value stock at 23x earnings, cheapest since 2023 profitability; Nvidia backing robo-taxi partnerships provides visibility; fundamental ride-share business strong; partner with autonomous operators rather than compete.
Cannot buy at current levels; wrong stock; inferior to McDonald's which had fantastic quarter.
Terrific earnings report but stock pulled back hard in afternoon from +11% to +2%; intriguing setup to buy on weakness tomorrow.
